name: keepseek-regression-auditor
description: KeepSeek regression review workflow for pre-merge audits, validation commands, and risk-focused findings.

interface.longDescription: Use this plugin to review KeepSeek changes before merge, prioritize behavioral regressions, missing tests, architecture drift, validation failures, and manual test gaps.
defaultPrompt: Use $keepseek-regression-auditor to audit this KeepSeek change.
Use $keepseek-regression-auditor before I merge this branch.
